meta.title: Ibraaz Raza | Senior Mobile Application Developer
meta.description: Senior Mobile Application Developer with 6+ years of experience building scalable iOS, Android, and React Native applications for production products.

brand.name: Ibraaz Raza
brand.availability: Available for long-term collaborations, contracts, and consulting
brand.intro: I build scalable, production-ready mobile applications across iOS, Android, and React Native with a strong focus on architecture, performance, and long-term maintainability.

hero.title: Building scalable mobile apps that perform in production.
hero.description: I am a Senior Mobile Application Developer with 6+ years of experience helping startups and product teams transform ideas into polished mobile products. My work spans native iOS, native Android, and cross-platform React Native ecosystems with a strong emphasis on clean architecture, modular systems, and release stability.
hero.spotlightText: Designing and shipping production-grade mobile systems that balance polished UX with scalable engineering foundations.

about.title: Senior mobile engineer with full-cycle product ownership.
paragraphs: My development journey began with native iOS engineering using Swift and UIKit, later expanding into SwiftUI for modern interfaces and architecture patterns. As product requirements grew across platforms, I moved into native Android with Kotlin and then React Native to deliver efficiently while preserving native-level quality.

I have worked across healthcare platforms, social networking products, messaging and media systems, map-based discovery platforms, and SaaS-focused mobile products. This range has strengthened both my implementation depth and my ability to align technical decisions with product goals.

I collaborate directly with founders, designers, backend teams, and product managers, and I focus on building reliable software that can scale over time instead of short-term implementations that are difficult to maintain.

cards.title: Native iOS depth
cards.description: Swift, UIKit, SwiftUI, StoreKit, Firebase integrations, performance optimization, and App Store release workflows.

cards.title: Android + cross-platform delivery
cards.description: Kotlin Android development combined with production-grade React Native systems for efficient multi-platform delivery.

cards.title: Scalable product architecture
cards.description: MVVM, Clean Architecture, modular code structures, API abstractions, release management, and long-term maintainability.

skillsSection.title: Mobile engineering across native and cross-platform stacks.
skillsSection.description: From architecture planning to production optimization, I build mobile systems designed for stability, scalability, and long-term growth.

projectsSection.title: Production applications across social discovery, healthcare, and messaging.
projectsSection.description: Selected projects where I handled architecture, mobile implementation, backend integrations, and production performance optimization.

projects.name: MorePaws - Social & Discovery Platform for Pet Owners
projects.summary: Map-driven social and discovery platform for pet owners and pet-related businesses.
projects.description: Built advanced interactive mapping flows with dynamic marker rendering, viewport-based data fetching, discovery filters, and event-driven user journeys across mobile surfaces.
projects.impact: Improved large-scale map performance and responsiveness through caching, dynamic loading, and scalable interaction architecture.

projects.name: Orli: Future Messenger
projects.summary: Future-focused messaging app for scheduling meaningful text, audio, and video deliveries.
projects.description: Built and optimized a mobile messaging experience that enables users to schedule personal messages for future delivery over SMS and email, with a strong focus on reliability, UX clarity, and production performance.
projects.impact: Shipped a production app with scheduled delivery workflows, media-ready message support, and dependable release quality for real-world user communication scenarios.

projects.name: Loop by SYMBYX
projects.summary: Health and wellness routine tracker focused on daily consistency and reflection.
projects.description: Built a mobile routine-tracking experience that helps users log daily health activities, manage reminders, complete wellness check-ins, and review monthly patterns in one structured flow.
projects.impact: Delivered a clean, habit-friendly mobile experience for routine adherence and wellness tracking with clear daily and monthly visibility.

projects.name: Staging Pro
projects.summary: Race-day companion app connecting racers with organizers through live schedule and status updates.
projects.description: Built a cross-platform race operations experience focused on instant communication between race officials and participants, helping users track event status, schedule changes, and critical race-day notifications in real time.
projects.impact: Improved race-day coordination by providing instant organizer-to-racer communication and reducing missed calls or schedule confusion during live events.

projects.name: MySideKick | Social Safety
projects.summary: Social safety platform focused on live awareness, group visibility, and campus/community safety coordination.
projects.description: Built and refined a mobile social safety experience that enables users to share safety signals, coordinate with private groups, monitor friend locations, and receive proactive alerts for safer daily movement and event participation.
projects.impact: Strengthened campus and community safety engagement through location-aware coordination, anonymous safety reporting, and faster friend-to-friend visibility in high-risk scenarios.

projects.name: RFO Central
projects.summary: Workflow platform focused on streamlining operational processes for business teams.
projects.description: Delivered an implementation centered on practical workflow efficiency, helping teams manage process steps, reduce manual friction, and keep operations aligned through a clearer product experience.
projects.impact: Improved day-to-day execution by centralizing workflow visibility and reducing operational bottlenecks.

projects.name: Punch
projects.summary: All-in-one construction operations platform built for renovation and field teams.
projects.description: Built a streamlined construction workflow experience that supports scheduling, task coordination, and day-to-day project execution with a simple, operations-first interface.
projects.impact: Enabled faster construction coordination by reducing fragmentation across planning, communication, and execution flows.

projects.name: Total Rehab
projects.summary: Digital physiotherapy experience supporting guided rehabilitation and patient progression.
projects.description: Delivered a rehab-focused digital product that helps users and care teams track progress, follow structured physiotherapy routines, and improve continuity between sessions.
projects.impact: Improved rehabilitation consistency by digitizing routine guidance, progress visibility, and engagement touchpoints.

engagement.title: What I can help with and why teams trust my execution.
engagement.description: I support mobile products from architecture planning to release stability, whether you need a new product build, scaling support, or focused consulting.
services: App Store and Play Store deployment
reasons: Hands-on experience across iOS, Android, and React Native ecosystems

contact.title: Available for remote opportunities worldwide.
contact.description: Open to long-term collaborations, contract projects, startup MVP development, app scaling engagements, team augmentation, and mobile architecture consulting.
contact.availabilityValue: Open for long-term, contract, and consulting opportunities
